name: PaintFreak
description: Ok so this bot concept isn't originally mine, I got it originally from 'Spongtube' and his PaintFreak bot on C.ai and there wasn't any other bots of PaintFreak here on J.ai so I decided to borrow Spongtube's, I will make my own version soon, also go check out Spongtube's original C.ai bot, also PaintFreak is a YouTuber and VA on roblox and Artist, make sure to check out her channel too!
creator: hmmmmmidfk
